title: Spanish-Style Paella
description: A traditional Spanish paella dish made with mellow rice, earthy vegetables, and flavorful seafood. This recipe serves 4 and can be prepared in about 45 minutes.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the paella spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish broth and bring to a boil.
Add the Spanish rice and stir to coat with the liquid.
Add the fish and cook until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes or until the rice is tender.
